rationale: Tests if positive momentum in speculative corporate debt leads shifts in high-beta tech growth allocation.
expected_failure_mode: Central-bank interventions can decouple corporate debt markets from tech equity growth trajectories.
stop_conditions: overlay worsens drawdown or live-era share multiple
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Annualized alpha relative to QQQ drops below 2% over a 5-year rolling window.
Maximum strategy drawdown exceeds buy-and-hold during credit crunch periods.
